title: Settings
fallbackBody: Standard configuration forms for {label} live here (A6 finalizes the full Settings surface).

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.body: Bring your own keys. Stored locally through SecretsProvider (.env in MVP) — never uploaded.
apiKeys.openrouterHint: One key, many cheap models (DeepSeek/GLM/MiniMax). Used by CI reviewers + openrouter agents.

models.title: Feature Models
models.body: Choose the model each system feature uses. The list and live prices come from OpenRouter; a feature falls back to its default until you pick one.
models.liveNote: Prices are pulled live from OpenRouter — USD per 1M input/output tokens.
models.noKeyNote: Add an OpenRouter API key under API Keys to load the model list and prices.

rootFolders.title: Project Doc Roots
rootFolders.body: Top-level folders scanned for Markdown project-context docs, applied to every repo in this workspace. Defaults to specs/docs/insights when unset.
rootFolders.duplicate: That folder is already in the list.
rootFolders.empty: At least one root folder is required.
rootFolders.note: Applies to every repo in this workspace. Docs are re-scanned on demand — nothing is cached.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.body: Appearance and sync preferences for this workspace.
workspace.themeHint: Color scheme for the studio UI.
workspace.pollingHint: How often to check GitHub for new PRs when automatic reviews are on.
workspace.syncTitle: Sync generated docs to a folder
workspace.syncOn: On — onboarding tours and digests are written to the repo folder

github.title: GitHub Integration
github.body: Connect GitHub to import pull requests and post reviews.
github.connectedSub: A personal access token is configured for this workspace.
github.notConnectedSub: Add a GitHub personal access token to import PRs and post reviews.
github.noRepos: No repositories connected yet. Add one from the workspace switcher.

about.title: About
about.body: Version and the model each feature currently uses.

autoReviews.title: Automatic Reviews
autoReviews.body: Poll GitHub for new PRs and run agents without manual triggering.
autoReviews.toggleTitle: Auto-run review on new PR detection
autoReviews.onNewCommits: On new commits to existing PR
autoReviews.pollingNote: Polling is the default. For instant triggers and CI execution, install the GitHub Action under Integrations.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.body: Connect CI and share your configuration as portable plugins.
integrations.githubActionDesc: Run agents inside CI on every PR
integrations.ciNote: Export-to-CI wizard + CI Runs view are owned by A4.
integrations.pluginExportDesc: Skills, agents, learnings, eval cases as a portable package
integrations.pluginNote: Plugin export/import is owned by A6.

plugins.intro: Export your agents, skills, eval cases and conventions as a portable <mono>.devdigest-plugin</mono> bundle, or import one to restore a config.
plugins.importPlaceholder: Paste a plugin bundle JSON here, or choose a file above…
plugins.noPluginsBody: Import a bundle to install a plugin.
plugins.noDigestsBody: Build a weekly digest to summarize review activity.
plugins.importFailed: Import failed — check the bundle JSON
